description: Update the WooCommerce email sender options and template design. Set the 'From' name to 'WooCommerce Store Support' and 'From' address to 'support@woocommercestore.com'. Configure the email template with the following: Header image 'https://woocommerce.com/wp-content/themes/flavor/flavor/images/woo-nav-logo.svg', Footer text 'Thank you for shopping with WooCommerce Store!', Base color '#2C3E50', Background color '#F0F0F0', Body background color '#FEFEFE', and Body text color '#1A1A1A'.

expected_settings.woocommerce_email_footer_text: Thank you for shopping with WooCommerce Store!
